pages.text: Through rotten flesh, you're able to enlarge and engorge some of the flies summoned with the $(l:focuses/wild/swarm_focus)Swarm Focus$() into $(l:summons/carrion_flies)Carrion Flies$(). When any of them kills their target, maggots will grow from their corpse and will follow you as well.
When cast with $(l:crafts/staff/wild_staff)Wild Staff$(), more Carrion Flies are summoned, wearing a Wild Robe will strengthened them, increasing their health and damage.
